events.title: March Madness Watch Party
events.description:
Get ready for the best time of the year at The AMP! 🏀 
Join us March 17 through April 6 as we stream all the tournament action on the big screens. Grab your crew, order from your favorite AMP vendors, and catch every buzzer-beater, upset, and bracket-buster with us. 
We’ll have food and drink specials, games, and entertainment throughout the tournament — plus live DJ sets on March 20, March 27, April 3, and April 6 to keep the energy high between matchups. 
Basketball. Food. Fun.

events.title: Indy Winter Farmers Market
events.description: Come out to the Indy Winter Farmers Market every Saturday from 9am – 12:30pm, until April 25th. With over 50 vendors, there is a little something for everyone!

events.title: Pitch a Single Friend
events.description: 16 of the most eligible singles will have their best friend pitching them to a crowd of 150+ mostly single people.

events.title: Trans Pride Fest
events.description: This event is an annual get together for transgender nonconforming people and those who support them in our allies to come and celebrate our trans community!

events.title: Coffee & Conversation: April 2026
events.description:
Mornings are better when we get together. ☕️ 
Imagine starting your day with a vibrant buzz, not just from your coffee, but from connecting with fellow local innovators. Our monthly Coffee & Conversation event is designed to do just that. 
Join us on the second Thursday of every month at 8:30 AM for a morning of free coffee, delicious donuts and making valuable connections that can help propel your business forward. This event is specifically crafted to bring Fishers businesses and entrepreneurs

events.title: Free Cowork Friday: April 2026
events.description:
Each month on the final Friday, we open our doors to anyone interested in trying out coworking! Potential new members can come in and enjoy free coffee & coworking as they test drive what a Launch Fishers membership is all about. We provide a reliable place to work for all sorts of people: entrepreneurs, remote workers, consultants, and more! 
Benefits of Launch Fishers membership: a comfortable workspace, a great community of fellow coworkers, phone booths, meeting & conference rooms, in-house

events.title: LEARN AT LAUNCH | Beyond the Noise: AI, Customer Voice, and the Retention Revolution
events.description:
In a world overflowing with customer data, the real challenge isn’t collecting feedback—it’s knowing what actually matters. Join us for the April installment of the Learn at Launch series, featuring global customer experience leader and bestselling author Karen Mangia. 
This keynote explores how leading organizations are using AI to cut through the noise, uncover meaningful customer signals, and turn insight into stronger retention and loyalty. Drawing on real-world leadership experience, Karen

events.title: STARTUP MASTERY | Improving Healthcare Outcomes
events.description:
How do we move the needle on patient health? It starts with closing the gap between clinical care and daily life. 
Join Launch Fishers and Plug and Play Indiana for the second installment of our 2026 Startup Mastery series. This quarter, we are diving deep into the technologies that keep patients on track in their care journeys. We’re bringing together the founders, clinicians, and corporate leaders who are using collaborative platforms to slash readmission rates and revolutionize patient adhere

events.title: H7 Network, Carmel, IN
events.description:
H7 Indianapolis IN Business Networking
**Wolfies Grill - Carmel**
*1162 Keystone Way S, Carmel, IN 46032, USA*

H7 Carmel is our weekly networking meeting open to local B2B and B2C professionals. Experience the distinct, structural, difference from other networking groups, associations, and chambers. Our community of meetings are led by Champion Leadership.

***All meetings welcome visitors, we'd love to show you what we're all about!***

\*\*\*Meeting Contact: \*\*\*

**Seth Wilson** *at* ***31

events.description:
Indyrb - Indianapolis Ruby Brigade
Join us to talk about Ruby, work projects, hack on something, or just get a drink or bite & enjoy the company.
